CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Continued To Jul-09-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kara A. Abelson, Esq. of Lombardi Loper & Conant LLP, Tel. 510.433.2600, for defendant and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was uncontested. PLAINTIFF CHRISTINA SANDERS' Motion To Amend 1st Amended Complaint is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff's motion states that plaintiff merely seeks to delete a cause of action. The proposed second amended complaint, however, seeks to add new punitive damages allegations too. The motion does not comply with Code of Civil Procedure 1010 or California Rule of Court 3.1110(a) ["A notice of motion must state in the opening paragraph the nature of the order being sought and the grounds for issuance of the order."] ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
